# UnfinishedCoGroupOperation

###

Related Doc: [package scala](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.UnfinishedCoGroupOperation> "Permalink")

####  class UnfinishedCoGroupOperation[L, R] extends UnfinishedKeyPairOperation[L, R, [CoGroupDataSet](<CoGroupDataSet.html>)[L, R]]

An unfinished coGroup operation that results from [DataSet.coGroup](<DataSet.html#coGroup\[O\]\(other:org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet\[O\]\)\(implicitevidence$30:scala.reflect.ClassTag\[O\]\):org.apache.flink.api.scala.UnfinishedCoGroupOperation\[T,O\]>) The keys for the left and right side must be specified using first `where` and then `equalTo`. For example:


    val left = ...
    val right = ...
    val coGroupResult = left.coGroup(right).where(...).equalTo(...)

L


The type of the left input of the coGroup.

R


The type of the right input of the coGroup.

Annotations
     @Public()

  20. ####  def where[K](fun: KeySelector[L, K])(implicit arg0: TypeInformation[K]): HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation[L, R, [CoGroupDataSet](<CoGroupDataSet.html>)[L, R]]

[ ](<../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.UnfinishedCoGroupOperation@where\[K\]\(fun:org.apache.flink.api.java.functions.KeySelector\[L,K\]\)\(implicitevidence$2:org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo.TypeInformation\[K\]\):org.apache.flink.api.scala.HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation\[L,R,O\]> "Permalink")

Specify the key selector function for the left side of the key based operation.

Specify the key selector function for the left side of the key based operation. This returns a HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation on which `equalTo` must be called to specify the key for the right side. The result after specifying the right side key is the finished operation.

Definition Classes
    UnfinishedKeyPairOperation

Specify the key selector function for the left side of the key based operation.

Specify the key selector function for the left side of the key based operation. This returns a HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation on which `equalTo` must be called to specify the key for the right side. The result after specifying the right side key is the finished operation.

Specify the key fields for the left side of the key based operation. This returns a HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation on which `equalTo` must be called to specify the key for the right side. The result after specifying the right side key is the finished operation.

  23. ####  def where(leftKeys: Int*): HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation[L, R, [CoGroupDataSet](<CoGroupDataSet.html>)[L, R]]

[ ](<../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.UnfinishedCoGroupOperation@where\(leftKeys:Int*\):org.apache.flink.api.scala.HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation\[L,R,O\]> "Permalink")

Specify the key fields for the left side of the key based operation.

Specify the key fields for the left side of the key based operation. This returns a HalfUnfinishedKeyPairOperation on which `equalTo` must be called to specify the key for the right side. The result after specifying the right side key is the finished operation.

This only works on Tuple [DataSet](<DataSet.html>).
